C
Click to capture mouse — then walk with WASD Mouse look · Shift = sprint · E = mount/dismount · C = camera 1st/2nd/3rd (mounted) · Menu has named walk starts · Scroll = zoom · Esc = exit
E — Mount forklift
VIEW / WALK MODE
CONTROLS
Click canvas to capture mouse · WASD — move
Mouse — look · Shift — sprint
E — mount/dismount forklift
C — camera 1st/2nd/3rd (mounted)
Scroll — zoom · Esc — exit walk mode
